voting.auth.title: TallyJ Online Voting
voting.auth.subtitle: Please authenticate to cast your ballot
voting.auth.welcome.heading: Welcome — You're Almost Ready to Vote
voting.auth.welcome.intro: In order to vote in this election, we need to confirm who you are. Your identity must match the information that the election administrator has on file for eligible voters.
voting.auth.welcome.detail: This is a simple one-time check — we're not creating an account for you or storing any personal information beyond what the election administrator already has. Once confirmed, you'll be taken directly to the ballot.
voting.auth.welcome.choose: Please choose one of the methods below:
voting.auth.email.label: Email Address
voting.auth.email.codeSent: Verification code sent to your email
voting.auth.email.description: If the election administrator has your email address on file, enter it here. We will send a one-time code to that address. Enter the code on the next screen to confirm your identity and access the ballot.
voting.auth.phone.label: Phone Number
voting.auth.phone.deliveryMethod: How would you like to receive the code?
voting.auth.phone.whatsappNote: A WhatsApp message will be sent to this number
voting.auth.phone.description: If the election administrator has your phone number on file, enter it here. We will send a one-time verification code by SMS, voice call, or WhatsApp. Enter the code on the next screen to confirm your identity.
voting.auth.code.label: Voting Code
voting.auth.code.description: Some elections provide voters with a personal voting code — usually sent by the election administrator by email, post, or in person. If you received such a code, enter it here to go directly to the ballot.
voting.auth.google.description: If you have a Google account and your email address registered with Google matches what the election administrator has on file, you can sign in with Google. This is a convenient option that doesn't require a separate code.
voting.auth.google.prompt: Click the button below to sign in with your Google account.
voting.auth.google.error: An error occurred while processing your Google authentication.
voting.auth.facebook.description: If you have a Facebook account whose email address matches the one registered for this election, you can sign in with Facebook.
voting.auth.facebook.error: An error occurred while processing your Facebook authentication.
voting.auth.facebook.popupBlocked: Facebook login popup was blocked. Please allow popups for this site and try again.
voting.auth.kakao.description: If you have a Kakao account (KakaoTalk) and your registered email or phone matches, you can sign in with Kakao.
voting.auth.kakao.error: An error occurred while processing your Kakao authentication.
voting.auth.kakao.popupBlocked: Kakao login popup was blocked. Please allow popups for this site and try again.
voting.auth.verify.message: We've sent a verification code to {voterId}
voting.auth.verify.detail: Please check your inbox (and spam folder, just in case) and enter the code below. The code is valid for a limited time.
voting.auth.verify.label: Verification Code
voting.auth.requestCode.sent: If the provided contact information is valid, a verification code has been sent.
voting.auth.requestCode.noOpenElections: There are no elections currently open for online voting.
voting.auth.requestCode.notRegistered: You are not registered to vote in any currently open election.
voting.auth.requestCode.sendFailed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.
voting.auth.requestCode.error: An error occurred while processing your request.
voting.auth.faq.title: Common Questions
voting.auth.faq.q1: Why do I need to sign in before voting?
voting.auth.faq.a1: To protect the integrity of the election, we need to confirm that each voter is who they say they are, and that they are on the list of eligible voters. This prevents anyone from voting more than once or on someone else's behalf.
voting.auth.faq.q2: What if my email address or phone number isn't recognised?
voting.auth.faq.a2: The information you enter must match exactly what the election administrator registered for you. If it isn't recognised, please contact the election administrator — they can verify your details or provide you with a personal voting code instead.
voting.auth.faq.a3: Yes, absolutely. This sign-in step only confirms that you are an eligible voter. Once you are on the ballot page, your choices are completely private. The system is designed so that no one — not even the election administrators — can link your name to the specific choices you made.
voting.auth.faq.q4: Can I vote more than once?
voting.auth.faq.a4: No. Once you have submitted your ballot, the system records that you have voted and will not accept a second submission from you. This is an important safeguard for election integrity.
voting.auth.faq.q5: What if I don't have a Google account or a phone?
voting.auth.faq.a5: You can use any one of the available methods — you don't need to use all of them. If you have an email address on file with the election, use the Email option. If you have a phone number, use the Phone option. If you received a personal code, use the Code option. Contact the election administrator if you are unsure which method applies to you.
voting.auth.faq.q6: Is it safe to sign in with Google?
voting.auth.faq.a6: Yes. Signing in with Google means Google confirms your identity to us — we never see your Google password. We only receive your verified email address, which we check against the voter list. Google provides this service at no charge.
voting.auth.faq.q7: What if I run into a problem?
voting.auth.faq.a7: Please contact your election administrator directly. They can check your registration details, provide a personal voting code, or assist you in any other way.
voting.auth.verify.voterNotFound: Voter not found. Please request a verification code first.
voting.auth.verify.noCodeFound: No verification code found. Please request a new code.
voting.auth.verify.codeExpired: Verification code has expired. Please request a new code.
voting.auth.verify.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Please request a new code.
voting.auth.verify.error: An error occurred while verifying your code.
voting.auth.google.notConfigured: Google authentication is not configured on this server.
voting.auth.google.emailNotVerified: Google email must be verified to vote.
voting.auth.google.noOpenElections: There are no elections currently open for online voting.
voting.auth.google.notRegistered: You are not registered to vote in any currently open election.
voting.auth.facebook.noEmail: Your Facebook account has no verified email address. Please use another login method.
voting.auth.facebook.noOpenElections: There are no elections currently open for online voting.
voting.auth.facebook.notRegistered: You are not registered to vote in any currently open election.
voting.auth.kakao.noContact: Your Kakao account did not provide an email or phone number. Please use another login method.
voting.auth.kakao.noOpenElections: There are no elections currently open for online voting.
voting.auth.kakao.notRegistered: You are not registered to vote in any currently open election.
